description: 家庭财务管理系统后端API文档

description.en: System health check - returns detailed system status
description.zh: 系统健康检查 - 返回详细的系统状态信息

usage.en: Checks system status, database connection, and resource usage
usage.zh: 检查系统状态、数据库连接和资源使用情况

description.en: Lightweight health check - returns basic system status
description.zh: 轻量级健康检查 - 返回基本的系统状态信息

usage.en: Quick check of system and database status
usage.zh: 快速检查系统和数据库状态

usage.en: Returns service information, version, and memory usage
usage.zh: 返回服务信息、版本和内存使用情况

usage.en: Retrieve all expense records with optional filtering
usage.zh: 获取所有消费记录，支持筛选

description.zh: 按日期范围获取消费记录

usage.en: Retrieve expense records within a specific date range
usage.zh: 获取特定日期范围内的消费记录

usage.en: Create a new expense entry in the system
usage.zh: 在系统中创建新的消费记录

usage.en: Sync expense records between devices
usage.zh: 在设备间同步消费记录

usage.en: Update an existing expense record by ID
usage.zh: 通过ID更新现有的消费记录

usage.en: Soft remove an expense record by its ID
usage.zh: 通过ID软删除消费记录

usage.en: Permanently remove an expense record by its ID
usage.zh: 通过ID永久删除消费记录

usage.en: Retrieve statistical analysis of expense data
usage.zh: 获取消费数据的统计分析

usage.en: List all available JSON files in the storage directory
usage.zh: 列出存储目录中所有可用的JSON文件

usage.en: Retrieve the content of a specific JSON file
usage.zh: 获取特定JSON文件的内容

usage.en: Save data to a specific JSON file
usage.zh: 将数据保存到特定的JSON文件

usage.en: Remove a specific JSON file from storage
usage.zh: 从存储中删除特定的JSON文件

usage.en: Generate and download an Excel file with expense records
usage.zh: 生成并下载包含消费记录的Excel文件

usage.en: Upload and import data from an Excel file
usage.zh: 上传并导入Excel文件中的数据

usage.en: Retrieve an existing member or create a new one if not exists
usage.zh: 检索现有会员或创建新会员（如果不存在）

usage.en: Retrieve detailed information about a specific member
usage.zh: 获取特定会员的详细信息

usage.en: Update the avatar for a specific member
usage.zh: 更新特定会员的头像

usage.en: Store frontend operation logs in the database
usage.zh: 将前端操作日志存储到数据库

description.zh: 获取日志列表（管理员功能）

usage.en: Retrieve logs with filtering options
usage.zh: 获取日志，支持筛选选项

description.zh: 获取日志统计信息（管理员功能）

usage.en: Retrieve statistics about logs within a date range
usage.zh: 获取特定日期范围内的日志统计信息

description.zh: 清理过期日志（管理员功能）

usage.en: Delete logs older than specified days
usage.zh: 删除早于指定天数的日志

usage.en: Submit error reports from mobile app
usage.zh: 从移动应用提交错误报告

description.zh: 获取错误报告列表（管理员功能）

usage.en: Retrieve list of error reports
usage.zh: 获取错误报告列表

description.zh: 获取错误统计信息（管理员功能）

usage.en: Retrieve statistics about error reports
usage.zh: 获取错误报告的统计信息

description.en: Mark error report as processed (admin function)
description.zh: 标记错误报告为已处理（管理员功能）

usage.en: Mark an error report as processed
usage.zh: 将错误报告标记为已处理

usageGuide.en: This API provides endpoints for managing household finances including expense tracking, member management, data import/export, and error reporting functionality.
usageGuide.zh: 本API提供了家庭财务管理的各种端点，包括消费记录跟踪、会员管理、数据导入/导出和错误报告功能。
